page: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-88-standardlssd is a memory-optimized and storage-intensive server instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor. It features 88 vCPUs mapped to 44 physical cores with hyper-threading enabled, operating at a base frequency of 2.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The system is equipped with 704 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8 GB per core. For local storage, it bundles six NVMe SSDs totaling 19326 GB of capacity.

Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core performance, with stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core scores placing in the top 25% tier. The Intel Xeon processor includes advanced instruction sets such as AVX-512 and Intel Advanced Matrix Extensions, which contribute to strong performance in specialized tasks, allowing Geekbench image processing benchmarks to reach the top 10% tier. Memory bandwidth is highly efficient, with both cached small-block reads and uncached large-block reads and writes ranking in the top 25%. Single-core performance, however, remains in the middle 50% average tier.

This instance is designed for memory-intensive and high-throughput database workloads. The combination of 704 GB of RAM and over 19 TB of local NVMe SSD storage makes it highly suitable for large-scale relational databases, in-memory data stores like Redis, and data-intensive analytics. The inclusion of AMX instructions also enables efficient CPU-based LLM prompt processing. From a cost-efficiency perspective, the server offers high resource density, combining massive local storage and memory capacity on a single node to reduce the need for distributed clustering.
description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-88-standardlssd is a memory-optimized and storage-intensive server designed for demanding enterprise workloads. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8481C processor with 88 vCPUs and 44 physical cores, it delivers 704 GB of RAM alongside 19326 GB of local NVMe SSD storage. The architecture supports advanced instruction sets including AVX-512 and Intel AMX, enabling strong multi-core execution and high-speed matrix operations. Benchmark results place its multi-core processing, memory bandwidth, and database operations in the top 25% tier, while image processing reaches the top 10%. Although single-core performance is average, the massive memory capacity and high-speed local storage make this instance highly efficient for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-88-standardlssd is an 88-vCPU server with 704 GB RAM and 19326 GB of local NVMe SSD storage, optimized for large databases and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Google Cloud Platform z3-highmem-88-standardlssd features 88 vCPUs, 704 GB RAM, and 19.3 TB NVMe SSD storage for high-performance database workloads.
tagline: A high-density memory and storage instance featuring eighty-eight vCPUs, seven hundred gigabytes of RAM, and nineteen terabytes of local NVMe SSDs.
bullet_points: 88 vCPUs and 704 GB of RAM powered by Intel Xeon 8481C processors
19326 GB of high-speed local NVMe SSD storage bundled
Intel AMX and AVX-512 support for accelerated matrix and vector operations
Strong multi-core CPU and memory bandwidth performance in the top 25% tier
Optimized for large-scale databases, in-memory caching, and data analytics
